title: Remove dangerously allow channel from Giga startup

log.context: Remove dangerously allow channel from Giga startup

Service is active and running. The claude process is now launched with just `--debug --dangerously-skip-permissions` (no `--dangerously-load-development-channels`). 

Note that the omni MCP server is still running (last line shows bun running the omni mcp), which is fine -- Giga can still use it to dispatch messages if BigClungus delegates tasks to it via inject. It just won't receive Discord messages directly anymore since there's no development channel loaded.
